title: Add in-process MCP transport (embedded server)
description: CC (services/mcp/InProcessTransport.ts:1-65) provides createLinkedTransportPair() which creates two Transport instances that relay messages via queueMicrotask() without subprocess or network. Used for Computer Use MCP (client.ts:917-942), Chrome MCP, and SDK-mode servers (client.ts:866-867). OC McpTransport trait (src/mcp.rs:123-131) has only StdioTransport and HttpTransport; no in-process implementation exists. Required: implement McpTransport for in-process use (channel-based message passing between two halves of a linked pair).
